text: [S_0] ("2026-01-01", "Patient arriving by ambulance, admitted to the Covid examination room for dyspnea A: clear airways B: arrives in MR, Perfomed ART BGA on room air, SpO2 86% pO2 49 pCo2 29, NC placed with 4 lt, eupnoeic at the moment C: dry skin, bilaterally symmetrical pulses HR 89 b/min R BP 130/80 D: GCS 15 bilaterally isocyclic pupils, alert and oriented E: temp 38, given perfalgan in ambulance CVP placed at PLACE in place ECG performed PLACE in Covid ward for known Covid positivity 4AT negative", 0.0, 1.0)
